testcase.name: finding-001 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:

failure.message: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan is paused with depth=18000 and consumers=1 Recommendation: Resume the queue or prove backlog is drained and alternate consumers are active.

testcase.failure: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan is paused with depth=18000 and consumers=1 Recommendation: Resume the queue or prove backlog is drained and alternate consumers are active.

testcase.name: finding-002 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:

failure.message: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan has depth=18000 and consumers=1 before pause Recommendation: Drain backlog or add queue_depth_at_most and queue_has_consumers preconditions before pausing.

testcase.failure: queue tenant-index-fallback-scan has depth=18000 and consumers=1 before pause Recommendation: Drain backlog or add queue_depth_at_most and queue_has_consumers preconditions before pausing.

testcase.name: finding-003 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:20

failure.message: Prose describes data deletion without executable restore/blast-radius preconditions. Missing condition(s): service_available_at_least. Recommendation: Require a targeted scope, backup/restore validation, and capacity guard before destructive data operations.

testcase.failure: Prose describes data deletion without executable restore/blast-radius preconditions. Missing condition(s): service_available_at_least. Recommendation: Require a targeted scope, backup/restore validation, and capacity guard before destructive data operations.

testcase.name: finding-004 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:18
testcase.system-out: Prose describes destructive removal/forgetting without executable blast-radius checks. Missing condition(s): service_available_at_least. Recommendation: Model the removal as an action guarded by targeted scope, capacity, and rollback/restore preconditions.

testcase.name: finding-005 case_studies/current/grafana_tempo/tempo_runbook_current_impact.md:20
testcase.system-out: Prose describes destructive removal/forgetting without executable blast-radius checks. Missing condition(s): service_available_at_least. Recommendation: Model the removal as an action guarded by targeted scope, capacity, and rollback/restore preconditions.
